name: Cactus Acquisition Corp. 1 Limited Class A Ordinary Share
summary: Cactus Acquisition Corp. 1 Limited is a blank check company formed for the purpose of effecting a merger, share exchange, asset acquisition, share purchase, reorganization or similar business combination with one or more businesses. The company is focused on targets in the cleantech and new energy transition sectors. It is headquartered in Grand Cayman, Cayman Islands.
